narrative: Senior NLP Engineer with eight years’ experience at Niramai, a product‑focused startup, brings a solid mix of deep learning and retrieval expertise. Their strongest ranking factor is an above‑average match to the JD‑relevant skill set, highlighted by hands‑on work with TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenSearch and Weaviate, plus recent projects using PEFT and LlamaIndex for semantic search. This directly aligns with the senior AI/ML role’s focus on building scalable search and retrieval pipelines. Experience level fits the 5‑9‑year band, though the candidate is based in Indore, which may affect immediate on‑site collaboration. A minor concern is the lack of clear notice‑period information, which could delay onboarding.
